response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience and strong software craftsmanship practices, this role requires specialized expertise in embedded security firmware, networking protocols, and critically, native-level Japanese proficiency—none of which are evident in the resume. His background is predominantly in web applications and modern development platforms rather than low-level systems, embedded networking, or security technologies like MACsec and IEEE 802.1X.
strengths: Extensive software development experience with strong TDD and CI/CD practices from roles at National Instruments, Dunnhumby, and others
Proven C/C++ proficiency and Linux platform expertise demonstrated through embedded robotic arm development and infrastructure work
Senior-level ability to learn new technologies and mentor others, with successful transitions across multiple tech stacks
concerns: No demonstrated experience with security technologies (encryption, key exchange, authentication protocols, tamper detection) or embedded security firmware development
Missing native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is listed as a critical required qualification
Career trajectory focused on web applications and full-stack development rather than embedded systems, networking, or low-level kernel modification work

key_factors.factor: No security technology or embedded firmware specialization
Strong general software engineering practices and C++ experience
